meta.title: Lausanne Sports 3-2 Young Boys (3 May, 2025) Final Score - ESPN (UK)
meta.description: Game summary of the Lausanne Sports vs. Young Boys Swiss Super League game, final score 3-2, from 3 May 2025 on ESPN (UK).

articles.headline: Former Man City defender Benjamin Mendy signs for FC Zürich
articles.description: World Cup-winning defender Benjamin Mendy signed for Swiss club FC Zürich on Tuesday after not playing this season for French second-tier club Lorient.

images.alt: Former Man City defender Benjamin Mendy signs for FC Zürich

articles.headline: Socceroos moves: Mabil exits Grasshoppers, Geria joins Niigata
articles.description: Awer Mabil is on the hunt for a new club after the fringe Socceroos winger was released by Grasshoppers, while Jason Geria has netted a move to Albirex Niigata.

images.alt: Socceroos moves: Mabil exits Grasshoppers, Geria joins Niigata

articles.headline: Bayern Munich loan Socceroos prodigy Irankunda to Grasshoppers
articles.description: Socceroos star Nestory Irankunda is celebrating a loan move to Swiss outfit Grasshoppers, believing his switch from Bundesliga giants Bayern Munich will only boost his global footballing education.

images.alt: Bayern Munich loan Socceroos prodigy Irankunda to Grasshoppers
